workspaces.workspace.workspaceproperties.Description: The compute type. For more information, see [Amazon WorkSpaces Bundles](http://aws.amazon.com/workspaces/details/#Amazon_WorkSpaces_Bundles).
workspaces.workspace.workspaceproperties.Allowed values: GRAPHICS | GRAPHICSPRO | PERFORMANCE | POWER | POWERPRO | STANDARD | VALUE

workspaces.workspace.workspaceproperties.Description: The size of the root volume. For important information about how to modify the size of the root and user volumes, see [Modify a WorkSpace](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/workspaces/latest/adminguide/modify-workspaces.html).
The running mode. For more information, see [Manage the WorkSpace Running Mode](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/workspaces/latest/adminguide/running-mode.html).
The time after a user logs off when WorkSpaces are automatically stopped. Configured in 60-minute intervals.

The size of the user storage. For important information about how to modify the size of the root and user volumes, see [Modify a WorkSpace](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/workspaces/latest/adminguide/modify-workspaces.html).
